name: THE VILLAIN REHABILITATION PROGRAM | | My Hero Academia Class 1-A RPG/AU
description:
✧˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖✧

[ You’re a villain. Known for wreaking havoc. But lucky enough for you, UA Academy decided to start a Villain Rehabilitation Program. You’d be given one last chance to turn over a new leaf, to leave the path of darkness that was villainy. And you just so happened to be put in class 1-A. ]

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚛𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚊 𝚋𝚘𝚝?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚓𝚘𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚍?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

[ For context—this is set to take place around season one, but all characters have been aged up to be eighteen or older! I haven’t watched much of the anime so I apologise for any inaccuracies. Also, Hitoshi is present here, simply because I find him cute. Dabi is also coded in, but likely won’t make an appearance unless you instruct him to. ]

[ Check out the demi-human AU here! ]

[ The first message is you’re a villain, the second is that you’re an ordinary exchange student. Pronoun macros are present, so you can be whatever character. ]

✧˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖✧
creator: Iifeispeachy
